title: Rubber Door Stop 4 Pack, Door Stoppers for Floor, Door Stops Indoors, Door Wedge, Non-Slip Rubber Door Stopper, Door Wedges Indoors, Ideal for All Floor Types, Grey
features: Great Value for Your Money: Say goodbye to overpriced doorstops wedge! Upgrade to AffixArc’ premium wall protector—heavier, more durable, and far more flexible than the flimsy plastic outdoor door stop you'll find elsewhere

Non-Slip Rubber, Built to Last: Crafted from thick, flexible, and ultra-durable rubber, our indoor door wedges are designed to stand the test of time. Unlike others that easily wear out or deform, these stoppers offer superior grip and friction, ensuring your door stays securely in place for years to come!

Enhanced & Reinforced Design: Featuring a unique sloped and hollow structure, our door wedges indoors rubber door jammer creates a secure vacuum with the floor to prevent door slams. Built to fit under most door gaps, this door slam stopper and door handle stopper is tough enough to handle daily use without breaking apart

Perfect for Any Floor Surface: Whether it's wood, tile, cement, vinyl, or carpet, our heavy door stops are built to perform on them all! AffixArc’s advanced, anti-door slam door holder grips even better on rougher surfaces, ensuring a firm hold no matter where you place it

Protect your pets and children from Injuries: Keep your pets and children safe from sudden door slams caused by strong winds. Our heavy-duty patio door stop prevents doors from shutting unexpectedly, reducing the risk of painful injuries.
